query:
-- 首先查找没有关联订单的partner_cities记录
SELECT pc.id, pc.partnerId, c.name as city_name
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.name = o.deliveryCity
GROUP BY pc.id, pc.partnerId, c.name
HAVING COUNT(o.id) = 0;

-- 首先查找没有关联订单的partner_cities记录
SELECT pc.id, pc.partnerId, c.name as city_name
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.name = o.deliveryCity
GROUP BY pc.id, pc.partnerId, c.name
HAVING COUNT(o.id) = 0;
